basics.title: The basics
basics.subtitle: Tell us which situation this plan is for and how you want to invest.
basics.situationLabel: Which situation is this plan for?
basics.descriptionPlaceholder: Anything helpful to remember about this plan.
basics.styleSubtitle: Pick how we balance growth and diversification across your accounts.

goals.title: Your goals
goals.subtitle: Tell us how much you want to reach and how sure you want to be.

dated.title: Goals with a deadline
dated.subtitle: Optional · e.g. an emergency fund ready by a certain date.
dated.empty: No dated goals yet. These are useful when something must be ready by a specific date.
dated.dateError: The date must be after the plan's start date.

confidence.question: How sure do you want to be?

withdrawals.title: Planned withdrawals
withdrawals.subtitle: Optional · money you'll take out along the way.
withdrawals.onetimeSubtitle: A specific amount taken out on a specific date.
withdrawals.variableSubtitle: Advanced · for living expenses that vary month to month.

review.title: Review your plan
review.subtitle: We'll find the shortest time to reach your goals.
